command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git add agents/*/MEMORY.md agents/*/JOURNAL.md && git commit -m 'Phase 9E.6 — Shared Event Runtime (35/35 tests passed)

- shared_event_runtime.py: 1,177 lines
- perspective_engine.py: 444 lines
- 4 JSON template files (env/gap/jose/agent events)
- Memory and Journal runtime wrappers (additive only)
- Live stream: 6 events, 5 workspaces, 2 archived events
- 181 audit records across 30 record types' && git tag Phase9E6-SharedEventRuntime && git push origin main && git push github main && git push origin --tags && git push github --tags && echo 'COMMITTED AND TAGGED'
